title: The Sin You've Been Managing Instead of Killing
caption:
You've been calling it a struggle. A habit. A thing you're working on. That language buys it time it hasn't earned.

Scripture doesn't say manage your sin. It says put it to death. Those are two different projects, and most men only ever run the first one.

Four moves that actually kill it instead of babysitting it: call it what it is, cut the supply line instead of white-knuckling the moment it shows up, say it out loud to a man instead of just to God, and fill the room you emptied before something else moves back in.

"Put to death therefore what is earthly in you." — Colossians 3:5

An empty house doesn't stay empty. Decide now what's going to fill it.

Save this before the next time it shows up.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #colossians #scripture #accountability
